message:
test(proptest): add 32 property tests for traceability_verification module

New proptest file covering serde roundtrips for all 5 enums
(CapabilityDomain, ImplementationStatus, GapSeverity,
VerificationCategory, PackVerdict), CapabilityEntry field-by-field
roundtrip, TraceabilityMatrix roundtrip, domain derivation determinism,
parsed_status/parsed_gap_severity determinism, GapSeverity ordering,
DomainCoverage partition/bounds via VerificationPack, GapRiskAssessment
score bounds and remediation flag consistency, and 11 VerificationPack
structural invariants (checks partition, failing subset, verdict
consistency, required bounds, summary, coverage totals).

All 32 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
